---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Your names and student numbers"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:    
  pdf_document:
      fig_caption: true
      number_sections: true
header-includes:
    - \usepackage{setspace}
---

\newpage 
\tableofcontents 
\listoffigures
\listoftables

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


If you want to double space your text, add:

\doublespacing to this document.

If you want to return to single spacing, add:

\singlespacing to this document.

To learn how to put all code in an appendix follow this link:

[Appendix](https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown-cookbook/code-appendix.html)
